response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a junior/mid-level entry position. Strong technical fit on the stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, PostgreSQL/SQL, AWS, Kubernetes) and even covers nice-to-haves like LLM/MCP work, but seniority mismatch creates high overqualification risk, likely salary expectation gap, and retention concerns. Berlin-based which fits on-site requirement.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js plus React experience across multiple Berlin roles
Covers nice-to-haves: LLM/AI-agent infrastructure, AWS CDK, Kubernetes
Berlin-based, fits the high on-site presence requirement
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior profile for an entry-level posting
Likely salary expectations far above junior/mid budget
Retention risk: unlikely to stay long in a junior IC role

key_factors.factor: Technical stack alignment (TS, React, Node, AWS, K8s, LLM)
